name: OrderedSet<T>
summary: A set of unique elements, with insertion order preserved.

methods.name: Add(T)
methods.summary: Adds an element to the current set and returns a value to indicate if the element was successfully added.

params.name: item
params.doc: The element to add to the set.

returns.doc: true if the element is added to the set; false if the element is already in the set.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Removes all items from the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1.

methods.name: Contains(T)
methods.summary: Determines whether the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1 contains a specific value.

params.name: item
params.doc: The object to locate in the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1.

returns.doc: true if item is found in the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1; otherwise, false.

methods.name: CopyTo(T[], int)
methods.summary: Copies the elements of the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1 to an System.Array, starting at a particular System.Array index.

params.name: array
params.doc: The one-dimensional System.Array that is the destination of the elements copied from System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1. The System.Array must have zero-based indexing.

params.name: arrayIndex
params.doc: The zero-based index in array at which copying begins.

throws.when: The number of elements in the source System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1 is greater than the available space from arrayIndex to the end of the destination array.

methods.name: ExceptWith(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Removes all elements in the specified collection from the current set.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection of items to remove from the set.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the collection.

returns.doc: A System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerator`1 that can be used to iterate through the collection.

methods.name: IntersectWith(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Modifies the current set so that it contains only elements that are also in a specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

methods.name: IsProperSubsetOf(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Determines whether the current set is a proper (strict) subset of a specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

returns.doc: true if the current set is a proper subset of other; otherwise, false.

methods.name: IsProperSupersetOf(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Determines whether the current set is a proper (strict) superset of a specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

returns.doc: true if the current set is a proper superset of other; otherwise, false.

methods.name: IsSubsetOf(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Determines whether a set is a subset of a specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

returns.doc: true if the current set is a subset of other; otherwise, false.

methods.name: IsSupersetOf(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Determines whether the current set is a superset of a specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

returns.doc: true if the current set is a superset of other; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Overlaps(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Determines whether the current set overlaps with the specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

returns.doc: true if the current set and other share at least one common element; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Remove(T)
methods.summary: Removes the first occurrence of a specific object from the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1.

params.name: item
params.doc: The object to remove from the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1.

returns.doc: true if item was successfully removed from the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1; otherwise, false. This method also returns false if item is not found in the original System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1.

methods.name: SetEquals(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Determines whether the current set and the specified collection contain the same elements.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

returns.doc: true if the current set is equal to other; otherwise, false.

methods.name: SymmetricExceptWith(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Modifies the current set so that it contains only elements that are present either in the current set or in the specified collection, but not both.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

methods.name: UnionWith(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Modifies the current set so that it contains all elements that are present in both the current set and in the specified collection.

params.name: other
params.doc: The collection to compare to the current set.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Returns the number of elements contained in the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1.

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the System.Collections.Generic.ICollection`1 is read-only.
